Package com.example.eventlotterysystem.database

Class NotificationSystemTest

Unit tests for NotificationSystem. https://stackoverflow.com/questions/53473006/unit-testing-with-mockito-firebase https://www.geeksforgeeks.org/java/introduction-to-mockito/
